title: Maintain livestock water supplies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain livestock water supplies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify maintenance requirements

pcs.text: Check livestock water supplies for quality, and inspect for signs of contamination or deterioration and low or interrupted supply
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check livestock water supplies for quality, and inspect for signs of contamination or deterioration and low or interrupted supply?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check livestock water supplies for quality, and inspect for signs of contamination or deterioration and low or interrupted supply.

pcs.text: Check components of water supply systems for wear, deterioration or malfunctions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check components of water supply systems for wear, deterioration or malfunctions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check components of water supply systems for wear, deterioration or malfunctions.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm maintenance requirements according to the maintenance plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm maintenance requirements according to the maintenance plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm maintenance requirements according to the maintenance plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify maintenance requirements

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform water supply maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform water supply maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform water supply maintenance.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for maintenance

elements.title: Carry out maintenance procedures

pcs.text: Maintain water systems and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and maintenance plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain water systems and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and maintenance plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain water systems and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and maintenance plan requirements.

pcs.text: Conduct maintenance, fault finding and repair of motors where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct maintenance, fault finding and repair of motors where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct maintenance, fault finding and repair of motors where necessary.

pcs.text: Report complex faults and repair requirements to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report complex faults and repair requirements to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report complex faults and repair requirements to the supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out maintenance procedures

elements.title: Complete maintenance activities

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment, materials and PPE
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment, materials and PPE?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment, materials and PPE.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain worksite.

pcs.text: Dispose of or recycle unwanted materials and waste from maintenance activities according to environmental practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of or recycle unwanted materials and waste from maintenance activities according to environmental practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of or recycle unwanted materials and waste from maintenance activities according to environmental practices.

pcs.text: Report work activities, and faulty and unserviceable tools and equipment to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work activities, and faulty and unserviceable tools and equipment to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work activities, and faulty and unserviceable tools and equipment to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete maintenance activities

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
